episodes.title: “Your Courage Is Contagious.” Rep. Jasmine Crockett Speaks to Epstein Survivors
episodes.description:
During an Oversight Committee hearing on Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse network, Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett delivers an emotional and direct message to survivors who have spent years fighting to be heard.

Crockett praises survivors for continuing to speak out despite intimidation, secrecy, and institutional failures that allowed abuse to continue for decades. She discusses the manipulation survivors faced, the importance of protecting children, and the need for accountability from both government institutions and the Department of Justice.

Drawing on her legal background, Crockett argues that what the public is witnessing is not just failure — it is obstruction of justice. She also challenges the silence from Republicans who did not attend the hearing and calls on the public to pay attention to who is willing to fight for survivors and who is not.

Throughout the exchange, survivors speak candidly about isolation, secrecy, and how finding community changed their lives.

This hearing is about more than the Epstein case. It’s about whether powerful people and institutions will finally be held accountable — and whether survivors will continue to be forced to fight alone.

#JasmineCrockett #Epstein #Oversight #Congress #Justice #Survivors #Accountability #JeffreyEpstein #Politics #Hearing #trump #maga #obstructionofjustice

episodes.title: Ahead of the Oversight Committee's Deposition of Les Wexner
